## Meeting Purpose

Prepare for the upcoming Strapi\<\>GrowthX AI-powered pSEO Webinar

## Key Takeaways

  - [The webinar will follow a structure of intro/story, AI content creation, AI-first website approach, and practical demos](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Presenters will aim for 3-5 slides each, keeping content fast-paced to maintain audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Demos will showcase practical applications of AI for content creation and website management using Strapi and AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [The team will use a shared AirOps sandbox environment for demo preparation and execution](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Structure and Content

  - [Agreed on a flow: intro/story → AI content → AI-first website approach → demos](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Each presenter to prepare 3-5 slides, aiming for a fast-paced, engaging presentation](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Marcel to cover his journey and success story with AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Paul to discuss Strapi's approach to content modeling and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Eoin to elaborate on jobs-to-be-done framework for website management](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Demo Planning

  - [Paul to showcase:](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
    1.  Workflow for automatically creating blog posts from YouTube videos using Strapi and AirOps
    2.  Process for updating meta descriptions and titles
  - [Marcel to demonstrate:](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [Page scoring](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [Messaging critique](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Eoin to present:](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Google Search Console integration for improving low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Discussed challenges with YouTube video transcription due to API changes](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [Explored alternatives for video transcription, including Deep Gram integration](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
  - [Agreed to use the shared AirOps sandbox environment (sandbox-growthx) for demo preparation](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

### Presentation Logistics

  - [Marcel to update slide deck styling for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Team to share latest pitch decks and overview slides for reference](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Discussed encouraging audience engagement through chat and reactions during the webinar](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Each presenter to finalize their 3-5 slides and send to Marcel for compilation](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Move demo workflows into the shared AirOps sandbox environment](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Marcel to request increased concurrent tasks for the sandbox environment on the day of the webinar](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=2670.0)
  - [Team to continue refining demos and testing in the shared environment](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=2647.0)
  - [Share updated company pitch decks and overview slides for reference](https://fathom.video/share/KEqkzDADUMTkNsBqaaxTo5yoYy2MQzDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
